title: Epstein files: DOJ plans to release new batch of documents 'fairly soon,' MS Now reports
summary_full: Bill Gates, Leon Black, Goldman Sachs' top lawyer, and others are expected to testify soon to a House panel about their dealings with Jeffrey Epstein.
summary_public: Bill Gates, Leon Black, Goldman Sachs' top lawyer, and others are expected to testify soon to a House panel about their dealings with Jeffrey Epstein.
